name: Beef with Caper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Beef Eye Of Round Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, tomato paste, soy sauce, vinegar, rosemary, salt and pepper; pour over roast, cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 2 hours or overnight.
2. Remove roast from marinade; wipe with absorbent paper.
3. Place roast, fat side up, on rack in open roasting pan.
4. Roast in moderate oven (350 degrees F.) 18 to 20 minutes per pound or to an internal temperature of 150 degrees F. for medium-rare.
5. Chill roast and slice.
6. Arrange slices of cold roast beef in an overlapping pattern on a serving platter; spoon caper sauce down center.
7. Sprinkle with paprika and garnish with tomato roses, green onions and parsley.
8. Serve with rye bread.
